title: Exactly how did Third Impact happen in 222
display_title: Exactly how did Third Impact happen in 222
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILER] Exactly how did Third Impact happen in 2.22? Post by FrDougal9000 » Sat May 11, 2013 11:01 am I've no clue if this question's already been answered but I may as well ask; I was discussing the Rebuild movies with a fellow Eva fan, who doesn't like Eva 2.22 and 3, and a point he raised was exactly how did Third Impact happen in this continuity? Considering that it occurred in EoE because of the fusion of Adam and Lillith (that is to say, a hand with an eyeball, a 14 year old, a giant purple robot and the Stay Puft Marshmallow Eldritch Abomination), exactly how does it work out in Rebuild? The closest I can guess is that Unit-01, being born from Lillith, merged with an Angel, born from Adam, as well as Rei having Lillith's soul, was what may have caused it. Was there actually any kind of official statement as to what happened or anything like that? Sorry if it's a bit long-winded, it's my first post after all.

[]: Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sat May 11, 2013 11:03 am There's a lot of discussion about this in the Impact Mechanics thread.
